extraction_hints.snippet: **To:** Board of Directors, Cedarbrook Group Inc. **From:** Corporate Counsel **Date:** February 20, 2026 **Re:** Post-Acquisition Corporate Structure of Cedarbrook Group

This memorandum describes the corporate structure of Cedarbrook Group Inc. ("Cedarbrook") and its subsidiaries following the completion of the acquisition of Lakeview Distribution Corp. on January 31, 2026

This memorandum describes the corporate structure of Cedarbrook Group Inc. ("Cedarbrook") and its subsidiaries following the completion of the acquisition of Lakeview Distribution Corp. on January 31, 2026
The following entities form part of the Cedarbrook corporate group

events.description: Ridgetop Realty Ltd. is a joint venture vehicle between Cedarbrook Group Inc. and Westcoast Properties Corp. pursuant to a shareholders agreement dated January 15, 2024
Weststone Capital Partners Ltd. holds its 40% interest in Bridgewater Asset Management Inc. pursuant to a unanimous shareholders agreement dated March 15, 2023

This memorandum describes the corporate structure of Cedarbrook Group Inc. ("Cedarbrook") and its subsidiaries following the completion of the acquisition of Lakeview Distribution Corp. on January 31, 2026

This memorandum describes the corporate structure of Cedarbrook Group Inc. ("Cedarbrook") and its subsidiaries following the completion of the acquisition of Lakeview Distribution Corp. on January 31, 2026

This memorandum describes the corporate structure of Cedarbrook Group Inc. ("Cedarbrook") and its subsidiaries following the completion of the acquisition of Lakeview Distribution Corp. on January 31, 2026
Cedarbrook Group Inc. owns 100% of Lakeview Distribution Corp., a corporation incorporated under the laws of Manitoba
Cedarbrook Group Inc. owns 100% of Lakeview Distribution Corp., a corporation incorporated under the laws of Manitoba
Cedarbrook Group Inc. owns 100% of Lakeview Distribution Corp., a corporation incorporated under the laws of Manitoba
Cedarbrook Group Inc. owns 100% of Pinoak Financial Services Inc., a corporation incorporated under the laws of Ontario
Cedarbrook Group Inc. owns 100% of Pinoak Financial Services Inc., a corporation incorporated under the laws of Ontario
Cedarbrook Group Inc. owns 100% of Pinoak Financial Services Inc., a corporation incorporated under the laws of Ontario
Cedarbrook Group Inc. owns 75% of Ridgetop Realty Ltd., a corporation incorporated under the laws of British Columbia
Cedarbrook Group Inc. owns 75% of Ridgetop Realty Ltd., a corporation incorporated under the laws of British Columbia
Cedarbrook Group Inc. owns 75% of Ridgetop Realty Ltd., a corporation incorporated under the laws of British Columbia
The remaining 25% is held by Westcoast Properties Corp., an arm's length third party
Pinoak Financial Services Inc. owns 60% of Bridgewater Asset Management Inc., a corporation incorporated under the laws of Ontario
Pinoak Financial Services Inc. owns 60% of Bridgewater Asset Management Inc., a corporation incorporated under the laws of Ontario
Pinoak Financial Services Inc. owns 60% of Bridgewater Asset Management Inc., a corporation incorporated under the laws of Ontario
The remaining 40% is held by Weststone Capital Partners Ltd., a limited partnership
Lakeview Distribution Corp. owns 100% of Lakeview Transport No. 1 Inc. and 100% of Lakeview Transport No. 2 Inc., both corporations incorporated under the laws of Manitoba
Lakeview Distribution Corp. owns 100% of Lakeview Transport No. 1 Inc. and 100% of Lakeview Transport No. 2 Inc., both corporations incorporated under the laws of Manitoba
The following entities form part of the Cedarbrook corporate group
**Cedarbrook Group Inc.**: Ultimate parent
**Lakeview Distribution Corp.**: Wholly owned subsidiary
**Pinoak Financial Services Inc.**: Wholly owned subsidiary
**Ridgetop Realty Ltd.**: Majority-owned subsidiary (75%)
**Bridgewater Asset Management Inc.**: Subsidiary of Pinoak Financial Services Inc. (60%)
**Lakeview Transport No. 1 Inc.**: Wholly owned subsidiary of Lakeview Distribution Corp
**Lakeview Transport No. 2 Inc.**: Wholly owned subsidiary of Lakeview Distribution Corp
Ridgetop Realty Ltd. is a joint venture vehicle between Cedarbrook Group Inc. and Westcoast Properties Corp. pursuant to a shareholders agreement dated January 15, 2024
Weststone Capital Partners Ltd. holds its 40% interest in Bridgewater Asset Management Inc. pursuant to a unanimous shareholders agreement dated March 15, 2023
